property.name: java.library.path
property.value:
C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21 in;C:\Windows\Sun\Java in;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Python314\Scripts\;C:\Python314\;C:\Python313\Scripts\;C:\Python313\;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\app\Admin\product\21c\dbhomeXE in;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey in;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Server 8.0 in;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21 in;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Users\Admin\Downloads\apache-maven-3.9.9-bin\apache-maven-3.9.9 in in;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21 in;C:\Program Files\Apache\Maven\apache-maven-3.9.9;C:\Program Files\Docker\Dockeresources in;C:\Program Files\MongoDB\Server\8.0 in;C:\Program Files\Redis;C:\Users\Admin\kafka_2.13-3.9.1;C:\Program Files\PostgreSQL\18 in;C:\Program Files
odejs\;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Shell 8.0 in\;C:\Users\Admin\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Program Files
odejs;C:\Users\Admin\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code in;C:\Program Files\mongosh\;C:\Users\Admin\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop in;C:\Users\Admin\AppData\Local\Programs\cursoresources\app in;C:\Users\Admin\AppData\Local\Programs\Kiro in;C:\Users\Admin\AppData\Roaming
pm;D:\Antigravity in;.

testcase.name: removeReaction_Success

cascade 2026-03-19T00:28:44.331+05:30 DEBUG 12296 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table attachments ( file_size bigint, id bigserial not null, message_id bigint, uploaded_at timestamp(6) not null, uploader_id bigint not null, file_name varchar(255) not null, file_type varchar(255) not null, file_url varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table attachments ( file_size bigint, id bigserial not null, message_id bigint, uploaded_at timestamp(6) not null, uploader_id bigint not null, file_name varchar(255) not null, file_type varchar(255) not null, file_url varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) 2026-03-19T00:28:44.348+05:30 DEBUG 12296 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table channel_invitations ( channel_id bigint not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, id bigserial not null, invitee_id bigint not null, inviter_id bigint not null, responded_at timestamp(6), status varchar(255) not null check (status in ('PENDING','ACCEPTED','REJECTED','EXPIRED')), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table channel_invitations ( channel_id bigint not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, id bigserial not null, invitee_id bigint not null, inviter_id bigint not null, responded_at timestamp(6), status varchar(255) not null check (status in ('PENDING','ACCEPTED','REJECTED','EXPIRED')), primary key (id) ) 2026-03-19T00:28:44.355+05:30 DEBUG 12296 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table channel_members ( is_archived boolean not null, channel_id bigint not null, id bigserial not null, joined_at timestamp(6) not null, user_id bigint not null, role varchar(255) not null check (role in ('ADMIN','MEMBER')), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table channel_members ( is_archived boolean not null, channel_id bigint not null, id bigserial not null, joined_at timestamp(6) not null, user_id bigint not null, role varchar(255) not null check (role in ('ADMIN','MEMBER')), primary key (id) ) 2026-03-19T00:28:44.361+05:30 DEBUG 12296 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table channels ( is_archived boolean not null, is_default boolean not null, is_deleted boolean not null, is_private boolean not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, created_by bigint not null, id bigserial not null, workspace_id bigint not null, description TEXT, name varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table channels ( is_archived boolean not null, is_default boolean not null, is_deleted boolean not null, is_private boolean not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, created_by ('PENDING','ACCEPTED','REJECTED')), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table dm_requests ( created_at timestamp(6) not null, id bigserial not null, recipient_id bigint not null, requester_id bigint varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table messages ( is_deleted boolean not null, is_pinned boolean not null, channel_id bigint not null, edited_at timestamp(6), id bigserial not null, ('REGISTRATION','PASSWORD_RESET','WORKSPACE_CREATION')), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table otps ( verified boolean not null, code varchar(6) not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, expiry_time timestamp(6) not null, id bigserial not null, email varchar(255) not null, otp_type varchar(255) not null check (otp_type in ('REGISTRATION','PASSWORD_RESET','WORKSPACE_CREATION')),
